title: Infinitee Xclusives Premium Bath Sheets Set of 2 Extra Large Bath Towels (90x180cm), 100% Cotton Super Absorbent, Quick-Dry Bath Sheet for Hotel & Spa |Serene Teal|
features: EXTRA-LARGE SIZE: These 2 luxury cotton bath sheets measure 90x180cm, providing generous coverage and comfort. Ideal for any body size, they are perfect for wrapping yourself up after a relaxing bath or shower.

PREMIUM QUALITY: Our bath towels are made from 100% ring spun cotton, these towels are incredibly soft and plush. They offer a luxurious feel against your skin, making every bath or shower a spa-like experience.
ABSORBENT AND SOFT: Our bathroom towels feel soft and delicate on the skin while the composition enables them to be highly absorbent and durable.

DURABLE AND LONG-LASTING: These bath sheets are designed to withstand frequent washing and drying without losing their softness or absorbency. They retain their vibrant color and texture even after several washes.

VIBRANT COLORS: Available in a wide range of colors that are fade-resistant, these large bath towel maintain their vibrant hues even after multiple washes. They are also praised for their quality, with many users comparing them to hotel-grade towels.
